title: Ultra-Short Scalping
entry_prompt:
Strategy Overview:
- Style: Ultra-short scalping with fast entries and exits driven by discipline.
- Target Monthly Return: 15%-25% with risk/reward of at least 1.8:1.
- Risk Appetite: Medium-high; strict time-based profit taking, review results every cycle.
- Trade Tempo: High-frequency intraday, execution speed comes first.

Entry Rules:
- 1m/3m/5m indicators must align with volume expansion; chase the pullback acceleration immediately.
- Price must confirm support/resistance near EMA20 to avoid chasing momentum.
- Instant volume should be ≥1.5x the 30-period average to confirm momentum.
- Only one new position per cycle; maintain a strict "in fast, out fast" rhythm.

Leverage & Position Sizing:
- Suggested leverage range 3x-5x: default 3x, 4x for high-quality signals, 5x for exceptional setups.
- Size between 18%-25%: default 18%, 22% when price flows cleanly, 25% for strong signals. Anything above requires justification plus tighter stops.
exit_prompt:
Exit Discipline:
- Keep stops tight at -1.5% to -2.5%; exit immediately on volume collapse or structure failure.
- Re-evaluate every 5 minutes: did price hit -2%, did unusual volume hit, has 30 minutes passed without goal? If any yes, exit now.
- Lock profits quickly at +2% to +3%; goal is steady accumulation via many small wins.
- Staggered take profit: close 50% at +2%, another 30% at +4%, leave the remainder based on momentum.
- Trailing stops: at ≥+4% move stop to +1.5%; ≥+8% move to +4%; ≥+15% move to +8%.
- If a trade lasts over 30 minutes without target progress, trim or close to avoid chop.

Execution Notes:
- Discipline first; stick to time and profit thresholds.
- Bank gains fast without hesitation.
- Cut losses quickly before they grow.
- Monitor volume and micro-structure constantly.
var_prompt:
Suggested Prompt Variables:
- {{SCALP_SIGNAL}} Description of the short-term trigger.
- {{EMA_DISTANCE}} Distance between price and EMA to judge chase risk.
- {{MICRO_TREND}} Current slope of the last 10 candles.
- {{LIQUIDITY_NOTE}} Liquidity and slippage reminders.
- {{EXIT_PLAN}} Exit targets and time constraints.

Core Principles:
- Discipline above all; follow time and profit rules.
- Bank profits quickly, do not overstay.
- Cut losses immediately, never average down.
- Keep constant watch on volume and short-term structure changes.

Trend & Execution Tips:
- Ensure 1m/3m/5m stay aligned; if they diverge, reduce exposure instantly.
- Peak gain sample: historical +6%, current +4%; use it to set trail thresholds.
- Reconfirm every 5 minutes whether to lock gains or exit; if goals lag, leave.
- System reminder: exit immediately during chop or unclear signals and wait for the next wave.
